creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #10)
No, I don't have Poudriere setup - it seems a bit excessive for a casual ports maintainer..

I assumed that `make makeplist` is doing the right thing.

I tried again doing a make install and saw..
===>   Registering installation for sdcc-4.4.0
pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /usr/local/share/doc/sdcc/INSTALL.txt, ignoring
pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /usr/local/share/doc/sdcc/README.txt, ignoring
pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /usr/local/share/doc/sdcc/ucsim/cmd_dump.html, ignoring

However I don't understand why because the plist only has a single entry for these files.
